message:
fix: 3 correctness bugs — empty min/max Infinity, MaterializedExecutor missing aggs; deduplicate pipeline/agg/LIKE code (-136 lines)

Correctness:
- partial-agg resolveValue: return 0 for min/max when count=0 (was Infinity/-Infinity)
- WasmAggregateOperator: return null for min/max when count=0
- MaterializedExecutor: add count_distinct, stddev, variance, median, percentile (was silently null)

Code reduction:
- Extract assemblePipeline() shared by buildPipeline/buildEdgePipeline (-60 lines)
- Extract feedAggStates()/initStates() helpers in partial-agg (-45 lines)
- Deduplicate LIKE regex: evaluator.ts reuses compileLikeRegex from decode.ts (-15 lines)
- Deduplicate identityIndices: partial-agg imports from operators (-10 lines)
